checklist_rows.detail: The admitted Tailnet operator path stays explicit in `scripts/run-first-swarm-tailnet-admitted-live.sh` instead of hiding the 4080 launch behind ad hoc shell history.

The launch script still stages repo state with `git archive` over SSH, materializes the remote worktree, and binds topology digest `144481e413d4892b375e7b5f2fd8d24b7d98094806506b0e00a34262a2a9aa07` plus workflow-plan digest `573b6df00266981819b8cb08654ac6e6f727418cb5a46768255e8ea27b2f2821` into the same retained admitted run.

The coordinator report retains one acknowledgement receipt for worker `swarm-linux-4080-a` with session `swarm-linux-4080-a-session-tailrun-home-admitted-20260327e` and digest `0779a0a548e9c84701e279c42f4e525138f816619093748abaa22488f127e3de`.

summary: The admitted 4080 lane now has one typed remote-launch packet. The Mac control plane launches the retained Tailnet run through `scripts/run-first-swarm-tailnet-admitted-live.sh`, stages repo state and run config onto host `archlinux`, records worker acknowledgement digest `0779a0a548e9c84701e279c42f4e525138f816619093748abaa22488f127e3de`, and keeps the Linux RTX 4080 contributor endpoint `100.108.56.85:35201` bound to the same topology and workflow digests used by the retained run bundle. The retained run bundle SHA stays checked against the committed bundle bytes before this packet counts.
